auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to continue your coding adventure
auth.signupSubtitle: Create an account and level up your skills

onboarding.ageDescription: This helps us tailor the learning experience to your level.
onboarding.languageTitle: What do you want to learn?
onboarding.languageDescription: Pick the programming language you'd like to master.
onboarding.skillDescription: Be honest — we'll adjust the difficulty for you.
onboarding.skill_beginner_desc: I'm just starting out with coding.
onboarding.skill_intermediate_desc: I know the basics and want to level up.
onboarding.skill_master_desc: I'm experienced and looking for hard challenges.
onboarding.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

chat.title: AI Tutor
chat.subtitle: Ask me anything about the challenge!

landing.hero_title: The Future of Programming Starts Here.
landing.hero_subtitle: Learn to code through interactive games and an AI Assistant that speaks your language. Built especially for kids and teens in Albania.
landing.feature_1_desc: Stuck on code? Our AI assistant explains errors step by step in your language, without giving away the solution.
landing.feature_2_desc: Earn XP, level up, and conquer challenges designed to make coding feel like a game.
landing.feature_3_desc: Write actual code in a real editor. No drag-and-drop — learn the skills that matter.

waitlist.title: Not ready to code yet?
waitlist.subtitle: Join the waitlist and we'll notify you when new courses launch.
waitlist.success: You're on the list! We'll be in touch.
waitlist.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
